title: BEM-840 route after 839
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if status_in=='triad_present':
    status='process_real_claude_response_next'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif status_in=='only_real_response_missing' or missing==['real_claude_response']:
    status='repair_real_claude_response_next'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher prompt/provider writer and retry response'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='repair_dispatch_results_next'
    next_action='inspect queue processor result writer and patch dispatch result proof'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='repair_claude_runtime_state_next'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and repair Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
else:
    status='repair_multiple_missing_proofs_next'
    next_action='repair first missing proof: '+(', '.join(missing) if missing else 'unknown')
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':status_in,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Route After BEM-839 Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'BEM-839: '+status_in+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.json','governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-839 proof verification and selected the next concrete repair step')
